languages.text: "Я знаю, как угасает род под недостойной властью. Мне ведомо, как фон Валанциус поколениями изживали свой дух, превращаясь в подобие обычных купцов. Знаю я и как династия может превратиться в марионетку. Я не дозволю подобному произойти".

"I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."
languages.original_text: "Я знаю, как угасает род под недостойной властью. Мне ведомо, как фон Валанциус поколениями изживали свой дух, превращаясь в подобие обычных купцов. Знаю я и как династия может превратиться в марионетку. Я не дозволю подобному произойти".

traits.locale_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know that the von Valancius have been whittling away at their spirit for generations, turning into something resembling common merchants. Finally, I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

"I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know that the von Valancius have been whittling away at their spirit for generations, turning into something resembling common merchants. Finally, I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

"I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

"I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

"I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

languages.text: "Ich weiß, wie unwürdig Führerschaft eine Dynastie altern lässt. Ich weiß, wie der Geist derer von Valancius im Laufe der Generationen geschwunden ist und ihre Anführer zu bloßen Händlern verkamen. Und ich weiß auch, wie eine Dynastie zu einer Marionette werden kann. Das werde ich nicht zulassen."
languages.original_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

traits.locale_text: "Ich weiß, wie unwürdig Führerschaft eine Dynastie altern lässt. Ich weiß, wie der Geist derer von Valancius im Laufe der Generationen geschwunden ist und ihre Anführer zu bloßen Händlern verkamen. Und ich weiß auch, wie eine Dynastie zu einer Marionette werden kann. Das werde ich nicht zulassen."

languages.text: « Je sais à quel point l'absence de direction peut nuire à une dynastie. Je sais que l'esprit de la maison von Valancius s'amenuise une génération après l'autre, faisant avec le temps de ses leaders de vulgaires commerçants. Et je sais avec quelle facilité une dynastie peut devenir fantoche. Je ne le permettrai pas. »
languages.original_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

traits.locale_text: « Je sais à quel point l'absence de direction peut nuire à une dynastie. Je sais que l'esprit de la maison von Valancius s'amenuise une génération après l'autre, faisant avec le temps de ses leaders de vulgaires commerçants. Et je sais avec quelle facilité une dynastie peut devenir fantoche. Je ne le permettrai pas. »

languages.text: «Sé que un liderazgo indigno marchita a toda dinastía. Sé que el espíritu von Valancius se ha estado deteriorando con las generaciones, convirtiendo a sus líderes en meros mercaderes. Y sé que una dinastía puede acabar convertida en una marioneta. No permitiré que eso ocurra».
languages.original_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

traits.locale_text: «Sé que un liderazgo indigno marchita a toda dinastía. Sé que el espíritu von Valancius se ha estado deteriorando con las generaciones, convirtiendo a sus líderes en meros mercaderes. Y sé que una dinastía puede acabar convertida en una marioneta. No permitiré que eso ocurra».

languages.text: "Liyakatsiz bir liderliğin bir hanedanlığı nasıl kuruttuğunu biliyorum. Von Valancius ruhunun nesiller boyunca nasıl çürüdüğünü, liderlerini sıradan tüccarlara dönüştürdüğünü biliyorum. Bir hanedanlığın nasıl kuklaya dönüşebileceğini de biliyorum. Bunun olmasına izin vermeyeceğim."
languages.original_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

traits.locale_text: "Liyakatsiz bir liderliğin bir hanedanlığı nasıl kuruttuğunu biliyorum. Von Valancius ruhunun nesiller boyunca nasıl çürüdüğünü, liderlerini sıradan tüccarlara dönüştürdüğünü biliyorum. Bir hanedanlığın nasıl kuklaya dönüşebileceğini de biliyorum. Bunun olmasına izin vermeyeceğim."

languages.text: “我很清楚，一个无能的领袖会怎样拖垮一个王朝。我也知道，冯·瓦兰修斯的家族精神如何一代代衰落，使它的领袖沦落为市井商贾。我更明白，一个王朝会如何沦为傀儡。我绝不允许这种事发生。”
languages.original_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

traits.locale_text: “我很清楚，一个无能的领袖会怎样拖垮一个王朝。我也知道，冯·瓦兰修斯的家族精神如何一代代衰落，使它的领袖沦落为市井商贾。我更明白，一个王朝会如何沦为傀儡。我绝不允许这种事发生。”

languages.text: 「私は、不適切な指導が王朝を衰退させること、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の精神が世代を超えて衰退し、その指導者がただの商人になったこと、そして王朝が傀儡になること。私はそれを許さない。」
languages.original_text: "I know how unworthy leadership withers a dynasty. I know how the spirit of von Valancius has been dwindling over the generations, turning its leaders into common merchants. And I know how a dynasty can become a puppet. I will not let that happen."

traits.locale_text: 「私は、不適切な指導が王朝を衰退させること、フォン・ヴァランシウス家の精神が世代を超えて衰退し、その指導者がただの商人になったこと、そして王朝が傀儡になること。私はそれを許さない。」
